title: cucurbita digitata
intro: Cucurbita digitata, also known as the bottle gourd or calabash, is a type of vining plant belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cucurbita digitata include aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cucurbita digitata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the fruit, leaves, or roots and then steeping them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
